title: Your Gifts Matter
excerpt: One of the best books I read last year was Stretched Too Thin by @jessicanturner . I needed to learn “how working moms can lose the guilt, work smarter, and thrive” and ended up with so much more. It was…
body: One of the best books I read last year was Stretched Too Thin by @jessicanturner. I needed to learn “how working moms can lose the guilt, work smarter, and thrive” and ended up with so much more. It was gifted to me by my friend @elisejoy at a time when I was truly struggling. This is one of my favorite quotes from the book, which through the 12th is just $1.99 for the kindle version. What makes you unique? Please share ❤️🧡💛💚💙
